This is the brand’s most premium e-scooter that has mostly been keeping to its $2,700 full price since hitting the market in August 2025. We saw it get its first official price cut last month during the brand’s Prime Day savings event, and the deal is returning here nearly a month later for a second chance at $200 savings to the lowest price we have tracked. items.summary: Heybike is having a clearance sale on three e-bike models, and our readers can score a bonus $200 exclusive savings for new all-time low prices on all of them! Things start lowest with the Mars 2.0 750W Folding Fat Tire e-bike at $799 shipped, after using the code 9TO5TOYS200 at checkout, but for the same price you might as well score the upgraded Mars 2.0 1,000W Folding Fat Tire e-bike at the same price using the same exclusive code. They usually go for $1,499 and $1,799 at full price, with discounts having dropped the 750W model as low as $899 in its history, while the 1,000W model has gone as low as $999. As I said, you might as well choose the upgraded model here with the exclusively combined $1,000 savings that lands it at a new all-time low price. Head below to check out the full suspension and all-terrain e-bikes also included in these deals while the stock lasts.

items.title: This $20 bundle turns Claude AI into your personal spreadsheet assistant (Reg. $97)
items.summary: Nobody actually enjoys untangling a broken VLOOKUP formula at 4:45 on a Friday. Or building a dashboard from scratch while your coffee goes cold. Excel doesn’t have to be that painful, especially now that AI can do a lot of the heavy lifting for you. The Claude AI for Microsoft Excel Mastery Bundle teaches you exactly how to make that happen, and it’s on sale for $19.99 (MSRP $97).

items.title: SoundCloud acquires decentralized music platform Nina Protocol months after its shutdown
items.summary: SoundCloud has acquired decentralized music platform Nina Protocol, months after the startup announced it would shut down. The deal brings Nina’s artists, editorial archive, and music discovery tools to SoundCloud as the company continues expanding its platform for independent musicians.

items.title: Yope raises $12.3M to build a private social network without algorithms or ads
items.summary: Yope, a fast-growing social app focused on private groups of friends and family, has raised $12.3 million in seed funding. Instead of chasing creators and algorithmic feeds, the startup is betting that the future of social networking lies in small, private communities powered by messaging, photo sharing, and AI features designed to strengthen real-world relationships.

items.title: Clearance pricing live on GoPro’s HERO12 Black Creator combo with battery grip, light mod, more at nearly $300 off launch price
items.summary: As part of its ongoing Black Friday in July sale, Best Buy is offering GoPro’s HERO12 Black Creator Edition bundle for $302.99 shipped. This originally launched at $599, and Amazon last had it listed for $550 before it went out of stock there once newer models hit the shelves. Best Buy is clearing out the stock here by taking $247 off its listed price and landing the bundle $47 below the previous $349.99 all-time low we tracked. This bundle delivers some serious value at this price, so snag it if you were looking to buy a new action camera.

items.title: Get an ultra-mini Qi2 15W 5K power bank for FREE with Baseus’ 25W Qi2.2 10,000mAh model at $45 low ($120 in value, 62% off)
items.summary: Courtesy of Baseus’ official Amazon storefront, you can now pick up its latest 10,000mAh Qi2.2 MagSafe power bank with 25W wireless charging for $44.97 shipped. The deal also includes a FREE 5,000mAh Qi2 15W ultra-mini power bank worth $50. Simply head to the promotion page, add both models to your cart, and the smaller battery pack will be discounted automatically at checkout. You’re getting roughly $120 worth of gear for just $45, which works out to about 62% in savings. The 10K Qi2.2 power bank is already a solid buy at this price, and the free mini model makes the offer even better.

items.title: Originally $45 Beats iPhone Air Case with MagSafe now just $4 Prime shipped (91% off)
items.summary:
Beats iPhone Air Case with MagSafe & Camera Control

Buy for $4 (Reg. $40.50)

What we love

Here’s a simple, basic, and ultra-clean case in neutral color you can score for just $4 Prime shipped – MagSafe, Camera Control button cover, and microfiber lining included. And considering it launched at $45, you’re looking at over 90% off. Some folks weren’t all too impressed with the latest Beats case lineup, but at $4 Prime shipped, it’s certainly worth a go if you ask me.

items.summary:
LEGO Icons French Café set

Buy for $63.50 (Reg. $80)

What we love

This Icons French Café set is part of LEGO’s Restaurants of the World series, with 1,001 pieces stacking up to build a charming French café that you would find amongst the streets of Paris. It is designed to fit right in with any brick-built cityscapes you have, or it can stand alone as some elevated décor, giving any room a splash of personality with its cute, picturesque facade, complete with flowerpots, ornate seating, food, and plenty of accessories.

items.summary:
Logitech G325 Lightspeed Wireless Bluetooth Gaming Headset

Buy for $39 (Reg. $80)

Apply LEVEL22 during checkout.

What we love

Logitech’s G325 LIGHTSPEED headset stands out with a clean design that skips the usual flashy gaming look. Its lightweight build should also make it comfortable for longer sessions, while the built-in mic keeps the profile sleeker than models with a boom arm. You also get low-latency LIGHTSPEED wireless connectivity here, along with up to 24 hours of battery life and AI-powered noise reduction to help cut down on background noise.
